name: remotepair
description: Turns the Xpair IDE into a xpair client: view-only Remote Desktop of the host, one-click SSH connect, and host-side notifications.

commands.title: Xpair: Set Up File Access (folder mapping / mount)
Xpair: Reset Layout (terminal left, RD tab right)

xpair.notifications.stop.description: Show host session completion and Stop notifications in the Xpair client.

xpair.notifications.askQuestion.description: Show Ask-a-question notifications forwarded from the host.

xpair.notifications.subagentStop.description: Show subagent completion notifications forwarded from the host.

xpair.notifications.approval.description: Show approve notifications forwarded from the host, including approval type when available.

xpair.telemetry.enabled.description: Opt in to Xpair product analytics and crash reports for this client.

xpair.remoteDesktop.bitrate.description: Remote Desktop H.264 target bitrate in bits per second.

walkthroughs.title: Xpair setup
walkthroughs.description: Connect to your host, understand the host-side permission model, and install the AI extensions.

steps.title: Connect to your host
steps.description:
Xpair drives a remote macOS host (default REMOTE_HOST from ~/.xpair/host/client.env). Click below to open the host filesystem over SSH.
[Connect to Host](command:remotepair.connectHost)

steps.title: Set up file access
steps.description:
Choose how this client reaches the host's files: Open Remote - SSH (edit the host directly), folder mapping + sync, or mount. Run the interactive setup to configure the host, folder mapping, and backend.
[Run setup](command:remotepair.setupFileAccess)

steps.title: Permissions are host-side
steps.description: Screen recording and folder access are granted on the HOST machine (XpairHost.app), not on this client. Accessibility is for host-side computer-use sessions; the IDE Remote Desktop is view-only. If RD is blank, check the host's System Settings > Privacy & Security.

steps.title: AI agents run via the CLI
steps.description:
Xpair runs AI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini) via the terminal CLI — start one from the New Session picker. Only Open Remote - SSH is installed automatically (for host connections).
[Install Open Remote - SSH](command:remotepair.ensureExtensions)
